{{Infobox character
| name = Doctor Cryce
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Technician gifts}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Aether Technician|master Aether Technician]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|doctor, medical professional, [[Aether Technician]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Titan Force headquarters]]}}
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Knight (novel)|The Knight]]
}}

''See also: [[Doctor Cryce Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Doctor Janbell Cryce]] is a [[Lichborn woman]] characterized by her gray skin, unkempt black hair, and glowing green eyes. Often appearing exhausted or preoccupied with her laboratory work, she frequently speaks in a rapid, hurried manner. She is an inventor responsible for the creation of the [[Divine Titans]] and has spent weeks traveling with a group of companions. Her professional duties involve inspecting armor, managing complex cooling systems, and performing technical repairs on [[Divine Titans]], such as the [[Red Divine Titan]]. While she can be suspicious or blunt regarding others' reputations and families, she maintains a deep trust in [[Raion]]. Her personal [[life]] is marked by grief, including the loss of [[Parryl]].}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A medical professional and master [[Aether Technician]], Doctor [[Cryce]] manages the infrastructure at the [[Titan Forge]] headquarters on the moon. This woman, who is [[Parryl]]'s aunt, possesses Technician gifts that are not applicable to biological modification and features solid gray hair alongside green eyes that glow in the dark. While interacting with [[Jan]] and Kyri, she provides medical information and bio-readings through an audio implant. Utilizing a wrist console, a tablet, and an ocular implant, she maintains her duties while demonstrating trust in [[Raion]].}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Cryce]] provides bio-readings and medical information.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c7">''The Knight'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Cryce]] communicates via audio implant.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Cryce]] is a character who interacts with [[Jan]] and Kyri.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c9">''The Knight'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Cryce]] is a character who manages the infrastructure at the [[Titan Forge]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c10">''The Knight'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Cryce]] is a master [[Aether Technician]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Cryce]] invented and built the [[Divine Titans]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Cryce]] has green eyes that glow in the dark.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Cryce]]'s hair is solid gray.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Cryce]]'s gifts are not applicable to biological modification.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Cryce]] is [[Parryl]]'s aunt.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c11">''The Knight'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Cryce]] is a medical professional.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Cryce]] has Technician gifts.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Cryce]] has an ocular implant.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Cryce]] uses a wrist console.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12">''The Knight'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Cryce]] uses a tablet console.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Cryce]] is a person the narrator knows.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c31">''The Knight'', chapter 31</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Cryce]] is a doctor located on the moon of [[Titan Force headquarters]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c38">''The Knight'', chapter 38</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Doctor Cryce]] is a woman who has trust in [[Raion]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c44">''The Knight'', chapter 44</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|As a doctor, [[Cryce]] provided critical warnings regarding the inherent limitations of their drone technology. After being requested by the [[Captain]], the doctor was assigned to work with [[Raion]]. [[Cryce]] successfully repaired the [[Red]] [[Titan]] and eventually managed to make the [[Red Divine Titan]] fully functional.}}

{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Raion]] is tasked to help [[Doctor Cryce]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c4">''The Pilot'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Doctor Cryce]] repaired the [[Red]] [[Titan]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Doctor Cryce]] is a doctor who warns about the limitations of their drone.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18">''The Pilot'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Doctor Cryce]] is a person the [[Captain]] requests.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c29">''The Pilot'', chapter 29</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Doctor Cryce]] managed to make the [[Red Divine Titan]] functional.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c46">''The Pilot'', chapter 46</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|“Doctor Cryce, I need readings on the others.”<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c7" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|"We’ll be piloting the drone from here, but don’t expect much out of it, ..." Doctor Cryce warned.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c18" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
